description: JSON schema for the updateActor operation request payload

identifier.description: The actor's unique identifier in the specification, used to refer to it from test cases. Skip this if no update should be made.

name.description: The actor's display name. Skip this if no update should be made.

description.description: The actor's description. Skip this if no update should be made or provide as an empty string to remove the current value.

reportMetadata.description: The actor's additional metadata for XML reports.

default.description: Whether the actor should be considered as the default choice for new conformance statements within its specification. Skip this if no update should be made.

hidden.description: Whether the actor should be hidden. Skip this if no update should be made.

displayOrder.description: The actor's display order relative to other actors when presented in test execution diagrams. Skip this if no update should be made or set to a negative value to remove the ordering altogether.
